description_long: This object is a compact, tactical firearm with a matte black finish, featuring a cylindrical suppressor or extended barrel at the front. The body is constructed from metal with a polymer or synthetic full stock, and it has a curved magazine inserted below the receiver. The trigger area is protected by a rounded guard, and the grip is ergonomically shaped for secure handling. The top of the receiver includes a simple iron sight, and the overall design is streamlined for ease of use in close-quarters urban environments. The firearm's construction suggests durability and functionality, with minimal decorative elements.
description: A compact, matte black tactical shotgun with a full stock, curved magazine, and cylindrical suppressor or extended barrel. It features a rounded trigger guard and ergonomic grip.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length, stock, curved magazine, and cylindrical suppressor or extended barrel.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular muzzle and the alignment of the barrel and suppressor.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the full stock, curved magazine, and overall streamlined profile.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock's end and the straight alignment of the firearm's body.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, cylindrical with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
